info.title: MoreTables API
info.description: MoreTables restaurant discovery, loyalty rewards, onboarding, reservations, reviews, and merchant operations API.

get.summary: Return the homepage discovery rail sections for mobile and web

get.description: Supported sections: top_booked, top_viewed, top_saved, highly_rated, new_on_moretables, featured, timeofday, moretable_lineup.
get.summary: Return one discovery section with pagination

post.summary: Record a restaurant detail view for discovery ranking

get.summary: List public reviews and summary stats for a restaurant

post.summary: Submit a review for a restaurant. Each customer can create one review per restaurant

patch.summary: Update the authenticated customer's review for a restaurant

delete.summary: Delete the authenticated customer's review for a restaurant

message.const: A new verification code has been sent.

enum: Expo push token was already inactive.

get.summary: List the authenticated customer's saved restaurants

post.summary: Save a restaurant to the authenticated customer's account

delete.summary: Remove a restaurant from the authenticated customer's saved items

message.const: Restaurant removed from saved items successfully.

get.summary: List the authenticated customer's restaurant lists

post.summary: Create a new restaurant list for the authenticated customer

patch.summary: Update one of the authenticated customer's restaurant lists

delete.summary: Delete one of the authenticated customer's restaurant lists

post.summary: Add a restaurant to one of the authenticated customer's lists

delete.summary: Remove a restaurant from one of the authenticated customer's lists

get.summary: Return the authenticated customer's lifetime points and current reward tier
Return the authenticated customer's reward point transaction history

message.const: Staff member removed from the restaurant successfully.

post.summary: Create an organization, owner, and one or more restaurants from the admin onboarding flow

message.example: This role is currently assigned to one or more users.
You cannot delete the authenticated admin account.

get.summary: Show the active lifetime reward program and tier thresholds

patch.summary: Update the active lifetime reward program and tier ranges

post.summary: Create a point transaction for a user and recalculate their tier

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
